data.title: Georgia’s Crypto Mining Boom Is Reshaping Its Energy Landscape
data.description:
Georgia has entrenched itself as a major global cryptocurrency mining hub, with mining operations now consuming roughly 5% of the country’s total electricity. The expansion reflects a convergence of low-cost energy, tax incentives, and a recovery in mining economics, positioning Georgia as one of the most competitive jurisdictions for crypto infrastructure relative to its size.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/georgias-crypto-mining-boom-is-reshaping-its-energy-landscape/

data.title: Musk: Don't let your loved ones use ChatGPT
data.description: Elon Musk retweeted a message on the X platform stating, "ChatGPT has now been confirmed to be linked to 9 deaths, 5 of which are alleged to be suicides caused by its interactions, with victims including teenagers and adults." Musk commented, "Don't let your loved ones use ChatGPT."

data.title: Solana Labs co-founder: SKR's low price benefits early adopters, but building a mature and thriving ecosystem will take 10 years.
data.description: Solana Labs co-founder Toly posted on the X platform that if the SKR price remains low, similar to the price during Solana's early CoinList auction, developers will fully enjoy the benefits of early participation, creating a natural selection mechanism for true long-term adopters and ultimately rewarding those early adopters who have invested significant time and effort. Toly added that rapid short-term price increases in tokens always raise concerns because excessively high market expectations are unsustainable, and building a truly thriving ecosystem typically requires a cycle of up to 10 years.

data.title: TenX Protocols Acquires 5.5 Million XTZ Tokens in Strategic Partnership
data.description: TenX Protocols has acquired over 5.5 million XTZ tokens, valued at approximately $3.25 million, as part of a strategic partnership with the Tezos Foundation. According to NS3.AI, the acquisition occurred between January 2 and January 19 through on-market and OTC trades, with an average price of $0.5868 per XTZ. TenX Protocols plans to stake these tokens using its own validator to generate recurring staking revenue.

data.title: Chainlink Enhances Oracle Network with Sub-Second U.S. Stock Market Data Updates
data.description: Chainlink has announced an upgrade to its oracle network, introducing sub-second data updates from the U.S. stock market through a pull model. According to NS3.AI, this advancement aims to facilitate more sophisticated trading strategies and decrease blockchain gas costs. The enhanced data streams encompass the vast U.S. equity market, significantly boosting decentralized finance capabilities.

data.title: XRP Price At $10 Too Low? Pundit Says That’s For Retail, Reveals Institutional Targets
data.description:
Crypto pundit XRP Queen has described an XRP price target of $10 as being too low, claiming that this target was from a retail investor’s perspective. She also suggested how high the altcoin could go from an institutional standpoint. Pundit Claims XRP Price Target Of $10 Is Too Low In an X post, XRP Queen stated that people predicting XRP price targets of between $10 and $25 are still thinking of retail price targets. This came as she claimed that Ripple has been thinking about global infrastructures
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-price-at-10-too-low/

data.title: The House of Doge, backed by the Dogecoin Foundation, plans to launch a DOGE payment app called "Such".
data.description: A team backed by the Dogecoin Foundation is developing a DOGE payments and commerce application called "Such," aiming to extend the utility of the Meme coin beyond transactions. The application is being developed by House of Doge, the official corporate arm of the Dogecoin Foundation, and its Nasdaq-listed merger partner, Brag House Holdings. Expected to launch in the first half of 2026, Such is a consumer-oriented product combining self-custody with built-in business tools. Its features will include self-custody wallet creation, real-time transaction updates, and merchant tools called "Hustles." House of Doge CTO Timothy Stebbing stated that the application aims to enable anyone to conduct business with Dogecoin. House of Doge CEO Marco Margiotta stated that its broader goal is to drive wider adoption of Dogecoin. Development of the Such application began in March 2025, led by a 20-person team based in Melbourne, Australia, and closed testing is planned before its public release. (The Block)

data.title: Delaware Life Insurance Integrates Bitcoin Index into Annuity Products
data.description: Delaware Life Insurance Company has announced the inclusion of the BlackRock U.S. Equity Bitcoin Balanced Risk 12% Index in its fixed index annuity offerings. According to ChainCatcher, this index combines U.S. equities with Bitcoin exposure through the iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF (IBIT), aiming for a target volatility of 12% while safeguarding the principal of the fixed index annuities.

data.title: Chainlink launches 24/5 US stock data stream, bringing US stocks onto the blockchain.
data.description: Chainlink announced the launch of its 24/5 U.S. Equities Streams, providing DeFi with, for the first time, U.S. stock market data covering pre-market, after-hours, and overnight sessions, enabling the approximately $80 trillion U.S. stock market to operate continuously on-chain. This data stream supports high-frequency, cryptographically signed market data 24/7, including not only median prices but also bid and ask prices and volumes, latest transaction prices, market status indicators, and data freshness metrics, providing complete market context for on-chain trading, clearing, and risk control.

data.title: U.S. Supreme Court Delays Ruling on Trump Administration's Tariff Policy
data.description: The U.S. Supreme Court has delayed its decision on the Trump administration's tariff policy, which was originally scheduled for January 20 at 3:00 p.m. UTC. According to NS3.AI, no new timeline has been provided for when the ruling will occur. This postponement introduces further uncertainty regarding the economic and market impacts associated with the tariffs.

data.title: U.S. Bitcoin ETF Experiences Significant Outflow
data.description: Today, according to Odaily, monitoring by Lookonchain revealed that the U.S. Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 2,886 BTC. Meanwhile, both the Ethereum and Solana ETFs reported no net outflows.

data.title: Delaware Life Insurance Company in the United States has partnered with BlackRock to launch an FIA product with Bitcoin exposure.
data.description: Delaware Life Insurance Company announced the addition of the BlackRock U.S. Equity Bitcoin Balanced Risk 12% Index to its Fixed Indexed Annuity (FIA) portfolio. This index, offered through the iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF (IBIT), provides Bitcoin investment exposure, combining U.S. stocks and Bitcoin, targeting a volatility of 12%, and protecting the principal of the fixed indexed annuity. (stocktitan)

data.title: Ucan fix life in 1 day (1) Market value briefly exceeded 20 million US dollars, with a 24-hour increase of 156.9%.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of Ucan fix life in 1day (1) briefly exceeded US$20 million, setting a new high. It is currently trading at US$17.54 million, with a 24-hour increase of 156.9%. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coin fluctuates greatly, and investors should participate with caution.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Experiences Narrowing Losses
data.description: U.S. stock indices have seen a reduction in losses, with the S&P 500 index declining by 1% and the Nasdaq index falling by 1.3%. According to ChainCatcher, these adjustments come amid fluctuating market conditions. The changes reflect ongoing volatility in the financial markets.

data.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Adds $108 Million in Ethereum, But BMNR Dives Amid Trade War Turmoil
data.description:
Ethereum treasury firm BitMine added $108 million last week, but its stock is down as markets react to President Trump's latest tariff threats.
source: https://decrypt.co/355134/tom-lees-bitmine-adds-108-million-ethereum-stock-dives-amid-trade-war-turmoil

data.title: Silver Hits Record High, Surpassing Nvidia's Market Cap
data.description: Silver has achieved a record price of $95, elevating its market capitalization to $5.3 trillion, surpassing Nvidia's valuation of $4.53 trillion. According to NS3.AI, investors are increasingly turning to precious metals such as silver and gold as secure investments in response to ongoing geopolitical tensions and macroeconomic uncertainties. Meanwhile, the cryptocurrency market, including Bitcoin, has experienced a downturn. However, there is potential for a reversal with anticipated liquidity injections from the Federal Reserve.

data.title: Chainlink Integrates Equities Data to Enhance DeFi Access to Traditional Finance
data.description: Chainlink has announced the integration of 24/5 equities data, aiming to bring the $80 trillion U.S. stock market onchain. According to BWEnews, this development is expected to enhance decentralized finance (DeFi) access to traditional financial markets. The integration allows for more seamless interaction between blockchain technology and conventional finance, potentially broadening the scope and functionality of DeFi applications. This move is seen as a significant step towards bridging the gap between digital and traditional financial systems, offering new opportunities for innovation and growth in the financial sector.
